differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
Pulmonary pathology related to chronic granulomatosis with polyangiitis
next_steps: Obtain complete blood count and iron studies
Perform transthoracic echocardiography to reassess aortic valve severity and hemodynamic status
Perform electrocardiogram and consider cardiac telemetry for arrhythmia surveillance
Obtain NT-proBNP and high-sensitivity troponin levels
Evaluate for occult gastrointestinal blood loss given age and anticoagulant use
Pulmonary function testing or high-resolution CT chest to assess for progression of ILD or sequelae of GPA
